headline: A Look At United Rentals (URI) Valuation After Earnings Miss And Softer Revenue Than Expected
summary: What triggered the recent move in United Rentals? United Rentals (URI) shares reacted to the latest quarterly earnings report, where revenue grew 2.8% year on year but came in below analyst expectations, alongside an earnings per share miss that weighed on sentiment. See our latest analysis for United Rentals. The recent pullback, including a 10.85% 1-month share price return and a 13.43% year-to-date share price return, contrasts with a 14.21% 1-year total shareholder return and a 114.81%...
